understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a `+` in the semantic grid was occupied by a selectable simultaneously, progressing through all levels within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, unless blocked by boundaries or wall objects; some adjacent objects could be pushable blocks that move along when pushed. Levels could include multiple selectable pieces, and control could be switched at any time using `CLICK` on a selectable’s exact pixel/grid position from the state; the movement blocked flags were only hints and did not always perfectly predict whether a move would succeed.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a `+` in the semantic grid was occupied by a selectable simultaneously, progressing through all levels within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, unless blocked by boundaries or wall objects; some adjacent objects could be pushable blocks that move along when pushed. Levels could include multiple selectable pieces, and control could be switched at any time using `CLICK` on a selectable’s exact pixel/grid position from the state; the movement blocked flags were only hints and did not always perfectly predict whether a move would succeed.
